item.title: That Same Ol Song and Dance Dump
item.description:
**Klangphonics ^ Happy Hump Day!
If you know any of these artists, drop their name and I will credit them accordingly!
I hope you're all doing well this week
**Left: Nati Dreddd. Right: Seth Staton Watkin Enjoy the tunes/performances!
Tenacious D - Heavy Metal
**@beholdyourfate on bandcamp! <3
**Verbalase .
Hell yeah
:)
.
.
.
Would.
.
A classic!
Hope you enjoyed this dump! I can't pole dance, but I can do other things °3* If you want to help a girly out financially and receive some fun pics/vids in return, message me! Thanks and see you Friday!
item.dc:creator: FlexxyLexxy

item.title: Boots with the fur!
item.description: Foster kitten Pumpkin Pie got a bath tonight and wasn’t super happy about it. But she’s all dry now and has a big fat belly. And she’s fully purring! And with her shaved arms she looks like she has boots with the fur. She’s doing SO well. I could not be happier. Keep it up, little one!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: Dumpling
item.dc:creator: GullahGullahIslander

item.title: Considering recent events in the States, I've come to a decision.
item.description:
I'm still around. Scared, trying desperately to keep my head above the waters of depression, trying to stay strong, but still around. For those curious about the journey of a random southern trans-girl, last update can be found here- https://imgur.com/gallery/22nd-has-come-around-which-means-one-thing-AgQsZPr
After doing some thinking, I've come to a decision. I'm moving forward with starting HRT. I refuse to let other's hatred and bigotry dictate the way that I live my life. Will it be risky? Probably. But I would rather live with a bit risk than to submit to some man-baby's demands. Besides, I've always wanted to be an existential threat to some transphobic nazi cock-gobbler.
As much as I love the name Yuki, I feel it's a little too out there, especially considering how the next few years are looking to go. If I wasn't living in the States, maybe, but I've settled on Amy. It's short, which is what I've always wanted in a name, and close enough to my dead name that it actually makes sense.
So there goes the 'official' path for HRT. But that doesn't mean I'm out of options. I was expecting this outcome and have sources for DIY. But I don't want to do it on my own. Thankfully my psychiatrist has been beyond amazing and will be doing lab work every few months after I start to make sure my antidepressant meds aren't messing with my body in a negative way.
My girlfriend has been on HRT for two decades, so I'm hoping she'll be able to help with this part. I'm gonna do some research and talk with her once she's up and about. There are so many options, but I know I want to use the estradiol gel. I probably need testosterone blockers as well, but my psychiatrist asked if I was thinking about doing that as well, so maybe it's optional. Again, I'll do some research tonight and talk with my girlfriend about it. So, yeah, that's about it for this update. I'm a little nervous about telling my mom that I'm going the DIY route, but since it's more of a pseudo-DIY since I'll still be seeing a doctor and making sure that I'm being safe, it should be fine.
item.dc:creator: PrincessBatCat

item.title: Midnight here! Right between Wet Wednesday and Thigh High Thursday
item.description: Update: I have now learned Wet Wednesday is NOT a thing here. Apologies to Wednesday Addams… Don’t think there’s anything to see, there’s two wet layers of thick, wet cotton. Improvised water fight as we debated what are the days of the week… RHM? THT? FF? I’m meeting fun people from Imgur IRL, when I come from a more conservative environment. Thank You
item.dc:creator: ladychantal
